title: COS Access Log Schema (CLS)
description: Field mapping for Tencent Cloud COS access logs exported to CLS via cos-internal delivery. Used by FinOpsAnalysis and cls-analysis-guide.md for LogQL queries.
log_source: COS access logging (COS → CLS via cos-internal delivery)

storageClass.description: Storage class at time of operation

reqUri.description: Full request URI with query string

errorCode.description: COS error code if request failed

eventTime.description: Event timestamp in RFC3339 format (alias for operationTime, preferred in CLS queries)

userSecretId.description: CAM secret ID used for request (masked: first 8 chars visible, rest redacted)

versionId.description: Object version ID (present when bucket versioning is enabled)

targetStorageClass.description: Target storage class for CopyObject or CompleteMultipartUpload with storage class change

deltaDataSize.description: Storage delta in bytes (positive=increase, negative=decrease). Available only on PutObject/DeleteObject events when bucket has versioning disabled.

storage_class_distribution.query: eventName:PutObject | select storageClass, count(*) as count, round(sum(objectSize)/1073741824, 2) as totalGB group by storageClass order by totalGB desc
storage_class_distribution.purpose: FinOps Phase 3a — identify storage tier mix for cost estimation

traffic_top_consumers.query: | select remoteIp, round(sum(resBytesSent)/1073741824, 2) as downloadGB, count(*) as accessCount group by remoteIp order by downloadGB desc limit 10
traffic_top_consumers.purpose: FinOps Phase 3c — identify top bandwidth consumers for traffic cost attribution

daily_storage_delta.query: | select date_trunc('day', eventTime) as day, round(sum(deltaDataSize)/1073741824, 2) as deltaGB group by day order by day
daily_storage_delta.purpose: FinOps Phase 3e — detect storage spikes vs baseline

ia_access_frequency.query: storageClass:STANDARD_IA | select eventName, count(*) as count group by eventName order by count desc
ia_access_frequency.purpose: FinOps Phase 3d — detect unnecessary STANDARD_IA access (should be rare)

idle_large_objects.query: | select reqPath, round(objectSize/1073741824, 2) as sizeGB, count(*) as accessCount, storageClass, max(eventTime) as lastAccess group by reqPath, sizeGB, storageClass having sizeGB > 1 order by accessCount asc limit 20
idle_large_objects.purpose: FinOps Phase 4c — objects >1GB with low access, candidates for tiering

empty_bucket_detection.query: NOT eventName:PutObject | stats count(*) as eventCount by bucketName
empty_bucket_detection.purpose: FinOps Phase 4a — buckets with no writes (requires manual ListObjects to confirm empty)

known_gaps.deltaDataSize: Only available when bucket versioning is DISABLED. With versioning enabled, net delta must be calculated from PutObject (+objectSize) minus DeleteObject (-objectSize per non-current version) per VersionId.
known_gaps.versionId: Present only for buckets with versioning enabled. Always null for unversioned buckets.
known_gaps.userSecretId: Always partially masked by COS. Do not use for audit trails that require full ID traceability.
